nasb.text: But also some women among us amazed us. When they were at the tomb early in the morning,

esv.text: Moreover, some women of our company amazed us. They were at the tomb early in the morning,

cnv.text: 而且我們中間有幾個婦女使我們驚奇，她們清早到墳墓那裡去，

ccb.text: 我们当中有几位妇女一早到耶稣的坟墓，

csbs.text: 还有，我们中间有些妇女也使我们惊讶：她们清早到了墓穴，
